required_record_contract.point_reproduction: the mean of utility_popularity must reproduce the archived U_ds point estimate for each dataset before resampling

negative_definitions.popularity: 100 iid draws with replacement from the empirical train next-item distribution; U_ds uses pairwise next-versus-negative cosine comparisons with half credit for ties
negative_definitions.uniform: 100 iid draws with replacement uniformly over catalog item ids; this is the diagnostic statistic and uses the same pairwise tie rule
negative_definitions.archival_limit: the realized negative ids and per-transition utility scores were not written by the Gate-0 generator

evidence_findings: The formal Gate-0 JSON contains four dataset aggregates and sixteen coherence-quartile aggregates, not 16000 transition rows.
The formal summary CSV contains one row per dataset; the coherence CSV contains one row per dataset-quartile.
The Gate-0 generator keeps popularity_scores and uniform_scores only in memory and writes only dataset and quartile summaries.
The formal local archive, the l20 formal archive, and Git object history contain no qualifying four-domain per-transition Gate-0 record set.

FOLLOWUP-09 has transition rows only for ML1M and Steam, uses a different four-rows-per-user protocol, has 19328 and 127292 rows respectively, and lacks utility_uniform; it is ineligible as a substitute.

p_1_over_24.assumption: all 4! label orders are equiprobable under exchangeability
p_1_over_24.not_a_claim: not a confirmatory p-value and not a confirmatory inferential result

paper_safe_wording.en: In the single archived Gate-0 sampling observation, the observed U_ds point estimates order the four datasets as ML1M > Beauty > ATG > Steam. Because the frozen per-transition records and user-cluster identifiers were not archived, this run cannot estimate uncertainty or full-order retention. Under exchangeability, 1/24 is only a descriptive combinatorial calculation, not a confirmatory p-value.
paper_safe_wording.zh: 在单次归档的 Gate-0 抽样观察中，四个观测数据集的 U_ds 点估计顺序为 ML1M > Beauty > ATG > Steam。由于冻结的逐 transition 记录与用户聚类标识未归档，本轮无法估计不确定性或全序保留概率；exchangeability 假设下的 1/24 仅为描述性组合计算，不是确认性 p 值。

forbidden_actions_not_taken: no popularity or uniform negatives were regenerated
no aggregate or quartile row was treated as a transition record
no FOLLOWUP-09 row was substituted for the Gate-0 sample
no training or model-seed run was launched
no confidence interval or order-retention probability was imputed
